---
name: Security issue
about: DO NOT use this template for security bugs
title: 'Please do not file security issues here'
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

Please **do not** open a public issue for a security-relevant bug (memory
safety in a parser, a crypto weakness, a CPace authentication bypass, a way to
break confidentiality/integrity of the data channel, etc.).

Instead, please open a private GitHub Security Advisory for this repository,
or reach out directly. See SECURITY.md for the current threat model and known
limitations first — it may already be documented as a known limitation.
